creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #1)
The double listing comes from an indirect dependency within the projects Cargo.lock file, of which make cargo-crates parses and generates the resulting CARGO_CRATES tuple.

This is seen across many ports[1] using cargo, as intended, so there's no issue there. :) 

[1] https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/search?q=base64-0.12.3 (specifically a query relating to the base64 create)
